Finding: scale buys fluency, not binding

Stepping the top rung to the mini preset on the same ungrounded corpus cured the finetune-degradation pathology and raised grammar and coherence by about a point and a half, but in-context binding stayed at chance and factual accuracy stayed flat, moving the bottleneck from model capacity to data coherence.

The mini rung (about fourteen million non-embedding parameters, 2.4x micro) trained on the first, ungrounded corpus. Finetuning now beats pretraining on every axis rather than degrading it: the comparable-loss table shows corpus validation loss falling slightly through finetuning (replay fully suppressed forgetting) while held-out pair loss dropped (real instruction gain). Grammar rose to about seven and coherence to about six and a half. But binding exact-match stayed at one in thirty-two (chance), and the probe answers do not even engage the question, while the accuracy probe stayed near one and a half. Parameters bought fluency and fixed finetuning; they bought no context-binding on incoherent data.

The result cleanly separates what scale fixed from what it did not. Two levers landed together on this run: the mini preset (node 43) supplied capacity, and the consolidated finetune recipe of pretraining-data replay plus validation early stopping (node 44) supplied a non-destructive finetune; together they cured the earlier collapse where finetuning degraded the base model on every axis (the residue of the off-by-one target bug, node 30). Fluency scaled with parameters, roughly a point and a half on grammar and coherence. Binding did not move at all: the score of about 0.03 is one exact match out of thirty-two, and the completions answer a question like which of two invented people is older with unrelated prose about stones, showing the model does not engage context-local facts. One caveat keeps this from being a pure capability verdict: the binding probe uses worldgen-invented names in a facts-then-question format that appears nowhere in this ungrounded corpus, so the number confounds cannot-bind with never-saw-this-distribution. That is exactly what the grounded corpus (node 46) is built to remove, so the grounded ladder (node 48) gives the first fair reading, and the honest comparison is binding within the grounded ladder across rungs rather than against this number. The factual accuracy probe (node 28) is treated here as a contamination gauge, not a target: a model trained only on synthetic text can know only what leaked from the generator, so binding (node 33), which uses facts given in context, is the metric that matches the project thesis (node 32). Net: the bottleneck has moved from capacity to data coherence, the lever the grounded-generation work just built.
